queries.question: Which theatre company produced Hamlet?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Theater_Company JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.theater_company_id = Theater_Company.id WHERE title = 'Hamlet';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name .
  ?stage_play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

queries.question: Who acted as producer for the show Hamlet?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Producer JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.Producer_id = Producer.id WHERE title = 'Hamlet';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?stage_play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

queries.question: Which companies staged plays with ratings above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Theater_Company JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.theater_company_id = Theater_Company.id JOIN Review ON Review.stage_play_id = Stage_Play.id WHERE rating > 8.5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasStage_Play ?stage_play .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
}

queries.question: Which directors staged plays with ratings above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Producer JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.Producer_id = Producer.id JOIN Review ON Review.stage_play_id = Stage_Play.id WHERE rating > 8.5;

SELECT ?name WHERE {

queries.question: Who directed plays with ratings above 8.5?
queries.sql: SELECT Producer.name, Theater_Company.name FROM Theater_Company JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.theater_company_id = Theater_Company.id JOIN Review ON Review.stage_play_id = Stage_Play.id JOIN Producer ON Stage_Play.Producer_id = Producer.id  WHERE rating > 8.5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasStage_Play ?stage_play .
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?stage_play p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name2 .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
}

queries.question: Which theatre company put on Hamlet and who was the producer?
queries.sql: SELECT Producer.name, Theater_Company.name FROM Theater_Company JOIN Stage_Play ON Stage_Play.theater_company_id = Theater_Company.id JOIN Producer ON Stage_Play.Producer_id = Producer.id  WHERE title = 'Hamlet';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?stage_play p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name2 .
  ?stage_play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who produced Hamlet?
Who directed plays with ratings above 8.5?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasStage_Play ?stage_play .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasStage_Play ?stage_play .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?theater_company a :Theater_Company .
  ?stage_play a :Stage_Play .
  ?stage_play p:hasTheater_Company ?theater_company .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasStage_Play ?stage_play .
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?stage_play p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?theater_company p:name ?name2 .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_f) > 8.5)
} }
}
